hero.title: Developer
hero.subtitle: Full Stack
hero.description: +3 years in Node.js with TypeScript building RESTful APIs

about.greeting_sub: I started my career three years ago.
about.p1: I build and maintain RESTful APIs in Node.js with TypeScript, using Fastify for modular architectures with full control over routing and plugins, and Django with DRF for microservices with a complete structure. Contract validation with Zod, authentication with JWT and OAuth, and security with CORS, CSRF and Rate Limiting.
about.p2: At the data layer I work with SQL and NoSQL: PostgreSQL and MySQL via Prisma ORM with migrations and seeds, and MongoDB for flexible structures. Redis for high-volume request caching and RabbitMQ for messaging in distributed flows.
about.p3: On the frontend I develop reusable interfaces in Vue.js with Vue Router for navigation, Pinia for global state, TanStack Query for async data and Tailwind CSS with Shadcn and PrimeVue. Experience with SPA, SSR and SSG focused on performance and SEO.
about.p4: Infrastructure with Docker and Docker Compose, CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, unit and integration tests with Jest, and provisioning on AWS with EC2 and Terraform.
about.status_sub: Looking for opportunities as a Fullstack or Backend Developer.
about.v4_h1: Refactored a legacy JavaScript API to TypeScript using Fastify, Zod, and Prisma ORM, eliminating ~80% of validation errors identified through Pino logs and direct user feedback, reducing timeouts and stabilizing request flow.
about.v4_h2: Implemented Redis caching to resolve overload in the request queue of a multi-tenant SaaS, reducing response time from ~5s to 2-3s in production serving 100+ concurrent users.
about.v4_h3: Restructured a legacy corporate system in PHP 7/NGINX, fixing duplicated logic, poorly allocated queries, and a JWT memory leak that exposed tokens and blocked subsequent requests.
about.v4_h4: Implemented a data ingestion pipeline with Python and Pandas to process 100k+ records with unique IDs, replacing outdated Excel spreadsheets and eliminating duplicates before insertion into MySQL.
about.capsul_h1: Participated in the migration of the core logistics system from Python/FastAPI to Node.js/Fastify, fixing request failures that caused loss of 300-500 orders per sales peak, with ticket values between $20 and $1,000.
about.capsul_h2: Integrated 20+ sales platforms and 5 major carriers in Brazil via APIs and Webhooks, standardizing payload mapping for processing and dispatch of 5k-10k orders.
about.capsul_h3: Developed an internal ticketing system using Aeria Lang and RabbitMQ, centralizing decentralized demands from support, logistics, and integrations into a single interface with priority and impact, eliminating operational noise between teams.
about.capsul_h4: Automated checkout form validation using Python and Selenium in a 24/7 loop, covering multiple payment methods including card, PIX, and variations, replacing a previously manual process.
about.capsul_h5: Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions for two isolated environments (Node.js backend and Aeria Lang), replacing manual SSH deploys with a structured PR, build, and delivery process using Docker Compose and Terraform on AWS.

skills.label: Technologies
skills.title: Stack that I
skills.footer1: Always adapting to new technologies in the market.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.title: Featured
projects.p1_desc: Multi-gateway RESTful payment API with automatic fallback by priority, role-based access control, and refunds through the originating gateway.
projects.p2_desc: RESTful API for financial management with support for income, expenses, categorization and monthly recurrence, built with Node.js, TypeScript and Fastify.
projects.p3_desc: Full stack task management application with JWT authentication, categories, read/edit permission sharing between users and email notifications via SMTP.
projects.p4_desc: Doom port running inside a PDF via JavaScript, with C code compiled via Emscripten to asm.js and rendered in ASCII.
